_description: Schema for captured triage interactions. Pushed by clients after /triage sessions.

privacy._description: Strict privacy controls. Enforced by Claude Code hook at push time.
send: structured corrections (grader name + correction type only)
never_send: inline log snippets or stack traces
user freeform notes that may quote ticket content

validation: Reject if any field contains text longer than 120 chars (likely ticket content)
Reject if payload contains patterns matching internal URLs
Reject if payload contains email addresses or IP addresses
Reject if payload contains Zendesk ticket numbers (ZD-NNNNNN pattern)
enforcement.fallback: If validation fails, strip offending fields and warn user

scope.excludes: All conversation before /triage and after triage completion

schema.user: github username of the tester (from git config)

ticket.resolution: current resolution at time of triage (may be Unresolved)

graders_fired: list of grader names that fired

corrections.user_note: max 80 chars, no ticket content - structured reason only

feedback.user_verdict: optional - what verdict the user thinks is correct

context.had_conversation: true if user asked follow-up questions
context.turns: number of user messages after initial assessment

transport._note: Direct commits to feedback branch, not PRs. Lightweight for pilot phase.
